top_signals.title: Pakistan says Iran and US agree deal to open Strait of Hormuz and extend ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Leaders expected to sign agreement on Friday for Tehran to clear mines in waterway and Washington to end blockade
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial to fund UFC fighter bonuses in USD1 stablecoin at White House event
top_signals.summary: The deal puts USD1 branding inside the Octagon at an event held on the White House South Lawn, on President Trump's 80th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
